title: qraftyfied: STRUCTURES
description: This pack adds many well built STRUCTURES to your minecraft world that invite you to explore them.  Now with TERRALITH support! 🫐
body:
# Ever wanted more structures in Minecraft? 🫐 ![qraftyfied title logo!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2a72b1eaaed1c688b1a9da46ef00201f4db1df2.png) ### **qraftyfied** massively expands your vanilla Minecraft world with **80+ handcrafted structures**: fully balanced, lore-friendly, and designed to feel *truly vanilla*. - ✔️ Carefully placed, biome-aware generation - ✔️ Multiplayer & modpack friendly - ✔️ Lore-friendly: You won’t even notice it’s not vanilla! - ✔️ Optional **Terralith** support - ✔️ Available as a **datapack** or **mod** (server-side) ⛰️ **Now with full Terralith biome support!** **Important:** - Use the **standard version** for vanilla worlds - Use the **standalone Terralith version** for Terralith worlds only --- ![https://www.qrafty.net/discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e84cad40de170a00e4be0283179e461b1d9a446.png) ## [DISCORD INVITE](https://www.qrafty.net/discord) 🤖 Get updates, sneek-peeks, report issues, and suggest new structures! (And chat with a nice community!) ---
CURRENTLY ADDED STRUCTURES 🫐 *All linked packs are also available as standalone datapacks.* ### Village Packs 🛖 - [Japanese Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftys-japanese-villages) - [End Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftys-end-villages) - [Halloween Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftys-halloween-villages) - [Bamboo Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftys-bamboo-villages) - [Jungle Tree Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftys-jungle-villages) - [Underground Villages & Bunkers](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftys-bunkers) - [Mushroom Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftys-mushroom-villages) - [Mountain Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftys-mountain-villages) ### World Structures 🌍 **Sorted by Biome** ## 🏜️ Badlands - Mesa Settlement ## 🌵 Desert - Akropolis - Camel House - Archaeology Site (Desert) - Oasis ## 🌻 Sunflower Plains - Windmill - Tulip Windmill ## 🌾 Plains - Hobbit Hole - Camp - Buried Villager ## 🌲 Forest - Hobbit Hole - Camp ## 🌳 Birch Forest - Birch Fort ## 🌲 Dark Forest - Magenta Shroom Clearing - Well - Castle Tower - Bell Tower - Mansion Remain - Mausoleum - Spook House - Spook Soul Infect - Spook Withered Grave - Stelzen - Transilvania ## 🍄 Mushroom Fields - Sunken City - Shroom Cabin - Mushroom Village ## ❄️ Ice Spikes - Ice Fort ## ❄️ Snowy Plains - Ice Fort - Igloo Building - Snow Camp ## 🏔️ Windswept Hills - Ruined Castle - Tower ## 🌲 Taiga - Archaeology Site - Tower ## 🌲 Old Growth Pine Taiga - Archaeology Site ## 🌲 Old Growth Spruce Taiga - Spruce Cabin - Blacksmith ## 🌿 Meadow - Azalea Ruins ## 🐊 Swamp - Lotus Sea - Swamp Mansion ## 🌱 Mangrove Swamp - Mangrove Watchtower ## 🐘 Savanna - Table Mountain - Stonehedge - Savanna Fort - Savanna Outpost - Termite Hill ## 🌴 Jungle - Jungle Treehouse - Maya - Lush Waterfall ## 🌌 End Highlands - Orbital - Overworld Leak ## 🪦 Pale Garden - Mausoleum - Cathedral - Pale Stem - Pale Watchtower
---
THEMED ADDONS 🫐 ### qraftyfied Addons Expand your world even further with **optional themed structure packs**. - **[qraftyfied Industrial Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/qraftyfied-industrial-structures)** 🏭 ![qraftyfied industrial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed0b677bb9d0ac31ed95e4edfb803e561142553f_0.webp)
--- ### Too many structures? You’re in control. Adjust generation frequency easily using **Sparse Structures** 👀 https://modrinth.com/mod/sparsestructures --- ![qraftyfied x TERRALITH logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbc3522df41b308db10f7ccea6e83dc9f134e988.png) 💙 **Terralith version created by NixyNebula**
